core_interpretation: Imaging is a structural/functional integration layer. Imaging findings require physiological, clinical, protocol and outcome context; they should not be used alone to infer symptoms or mechanisms.
guardrails: Do not infer disease from adaptive spaceflight remodeling alone.
Do not infer symptoms from imaging abnormalities without functional outcome.
Do not infer absence of disease from normal imaging alone.
Do not compare imaging across devices/protocols without calibration.
Do not use imaging as a standalone mechanism layer.
research_gaps: Sparse longitudinal studies linking advanced imaging markers to operational outcomes.
Need harmonization across ONSD, muscle, bone and AI imaging pipelines.
